name: Feedback sink
goal: Own the feedback subject + transport scope, normalize bubbling descendant events into FeedbackEvent records, and persist them via the configured transport.
description: Invisible (display: contents) wrapper that listens for ce-rating-change, ce-bookmark-change, ce-dismiss-change, ce-comment-change, ce-feedback-clear, and ce-feedback-export-request events bubbling through the subtree. Every change is normalized to a FeedbackEvent (schema, subject, item, label, action, value, ts) and pushed into a pending batch flushed per batch-ms. Five transports are supported: localstorage (default), http (with optional localstorage offline-fallback), file (showSaveFilePicker with anchor-download fallback), console, and custom (via the .transportImpl JS-only property). Dispatches ce-feedback-persisted and ce-feedback-failed after each flush, and ce-feedback-state with the freshly aggregated SubjectState. Hydrates from localStorage on connect when the local-storage transport is selected. Implements export-request actions for markdown (clipboard), json (anchor-download), submit (HTTP POST), and clear.

props.name: subject
props.description: Subject grouping id (key into localStorage / wire payloads).

props.name: batchMs
props.description: Debounce window for batching events; 0 = flush immediately.

props.name: schemaVersion
props.description: Wire-protocol version stamped on every FeedbackEvent.

events.name: ce-feedback-persisted
events.description: Fires after every successful flush; events may be empty for export operations.

events.name: ce-feedback-failed
events.description: Fires when a transport throws or returns a non-2xx response.

events.name: ce-feedback-state
events.description: Fires after every state change with the freshly aggregated per-item state.

methods.name: getState
methods.description: Returns a snapshot of the current per-item aggregated state (deep-cloned).

slots.description: The dashboard subtree whose feedback events the sink intercepts.

globalDependencies.purpose: persist + hydrate per-subject state under ce-feedback:<subject>
transport=http POSTs feedback events to endpoint
transport=file picks a target file once and writes JSON exports
ce-feedback-export-request format=markdown copies the rendered markdown

sideEffects.reason: default privacy-first transport — no network traffic by default

sideEffects.description: POSTs FeedbackEvent batches to endpoint when transport=http or on submit export-request
sideEffects.reason: explicitly opted in by attribute or export action
cap event volume from rapid clicks

sideEffects.description: transient anchor and Blob URL creation for file/json downloads
sideEffects.reason: no third-party dependency for export downloads

a11y.notes: Invisible host (display: contents) — contributes no layout and no ARIA. Accessibility responsibility lives with descendants.
